estimate_disclaimers.flat_fee: This price is final for the described labor unless the scope changes on site. Materials (if any) are extra and will be confirmed before work begins.
estimate_disclaimers.hourly: Hourly services are billed for the actual time worked. Estimate based on typical durations; final amount may vary. Materials (if any) are extra.
estimate_disclaimers.project_based: All estimates are preliminary and non‑binding. Your final, binding price will be confirmed after our technician inspects the job site and you approve the exact scope and material selections. You are not committed until you accept the final quote.
